'''zhahuzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dyadic|dyadic]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-h-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dyadic|dyadic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhahuzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæhizhith|zhæhizhith]] || [[word:zhæhizhij|zhæhizhij]] || [[word:zhæhizhish|zhæhizhish]] || [[word:zhæhizhi|zhæhizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhahuhuzhuth|zhahuhuzhuth]] || [[word:zhahuhuzhuj|zhahuhuzhuj]] || [[word:zhahuhuzhush|zhahuhuzhush]] || [[word:zhahuhuzhu|zhahuhuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhahuzhuth|zhahuzhuth]] || [[word:zhahuzhuj|zhahuzhuj]] || [[word:zhahuzhush|zhahuzhush]] || [[word:zhahuzhu|zhahuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhahufzhuth|zhahufzhuth]] || [[word:zhahufzhuj|zhahufzhuj]] || [[word:zhahufzhush|zhahufzhush]] || [[word:zhahufzhuf|zhahufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhahuzhuthu|zhahuzhuthu]] || [[word:zhahuzhuju|zhahuzhuju]] || [[word:zhahuzhushu|zhahuzhushu]] || [[word:zhahuzhuku|zhahuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhahuzhuth|zhahuzhuth]] || [[word:zhahuzhuj|zhahuzhuj]] || [[word:zhahuzhush|zhahuzhush]] || [[word:zhahuzhu|zhahuzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhahuzhuthul|zhahuzhuthul]] || [[word:zhahuzhujul|zhahuzhujul]] || [[word:zhahuzhushul|zhahuzhushul]] || [[word:zhahuzhukul|zhahuzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhahuzhuthuthu|zhahuzhuthuthu]] || [[word:zhahuzhujuju|zhahuzhujuju]] || [[word:zhahuzhushushu|zhahuzhushushu]] || [[word:zhahuzhuku|zhahuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhahuzhuthun|zhahuzhuthun]] || [[word:zhahuzhujun|zhahuzhujun]] || [[word:zhahuzhushun|zhahuzhushun]] || [[word:zhahuzhukun|zhahuzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhahuzhuthuoro|zhahuzhuthuoro]] || [[word:zhahuzhujuoro|zhahuzhujuoro]] || [[word:zhahuzhushuoro|zhahuzhushuoro]] || [[word:zhahuzhukuoro|zhahuzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
